name: Document Grid
notes: React class component (~800 lines). God component containing API calls, filtering/sorting logic, inline CSS-in-JS styles, an embedded tag editor modal, and drag-and-drop file upload — all in one file.
Documents are loaded on componentDidMount via GET /api/documents; when a search query is active, the same document list slot is replaced by GET /api/search?q={query} results.

Client-side filtering (file type + text match against name/tags) and sorting (date|name|type) run inside render() using the module-local filterDocuments() and sortDocuments() helpers — no additional API round-trips.

Upload writes to the 'documents' table via POST /api/upload; a DB trigger (trg_sync_to_v2) copies the row to 'documents_v2' but deliberately omits the tags column, so a freshly uploaded document's tags are null in documents_v2 until the user saves them manually.
